name: SAP IBP
description: SAP IBP is a useful planning surface inside Supply Chain & Logistics.
whyUseIt: People in Supply Chain & Logistics use SAP IBP to make the field more visible, testable, collaborative, or operational.
beginnerMistakes: Using SAP IBP as a substitute for thinking instead of a way to sharpen it.
Skipping documentation and context when sharing output from SAP IBP.
